summary_points: Core protocol and fuse reliability changes are the highest-impact updates.
Release tooling changes improve draft determinism and evidence curation.

categories.name: core
key_points: WebSocket handshake validation was tightened for invalid client nonce flows.
Fuse mount cleanup now guards against teardown on inactive mounts.
retained_snippets: Reject invalid nonce before handshake completion.
Check mount active state before cleanup.
caution_notes: No migration or API compatibility claims should be inferred from this evidence.

categories.name: tools
key_points: Deterministic payload output and truncation metadata were expanded.
retained_snippets: Payload schema and truncation metadata changes.
CLI command tests for changelog output paths.

dropped_noise: Single-line meta wording updates with no behavior impact.
caution_notes: Packaging updates are low-volume in this range and should not be overstated.
